VOResourceValidation.testQuery:
Resource record must be compliant with the VOResource schemas. 46: UndeclaredPrefix: Cannot resolve 'vr:WebBrowser' as a QName: the prefix 'vr' is not declared. 46: cvc-elt.4.1: The value 'vr:WebBrowser' of attribute 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance,type' of element 'interface' is not a valid QName. 46: cvc-type.2: The type definition cannot be abstract for element interface. 46: UndeclaredPrefix: Cannot resolve 'vr:WebBrowser' as a QName: the prefix 'vr' is not declared. 46: cvc-attribute.3: The value 'vr:WebBrowser' of attribute 'xsi:type' on element 'interface' is not valid with respect to its type, 'QName'.
service-for LEDAS
